Script.label: AICE Pitot Both TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:var_PitotHeatSwitch_L, Bool) ! s1 l1 (>L:var_PitotHeatSwitch_L, Bool) (WAIT:100|200) l1 (>L:var_PitotHeatSwitch_R, Bool)

Script.label: AICE Windshield Both TOGGLE
Script.script: 0 1 2 1 (L:var_WindshieldAntiIceSwitch_L, Bool) (L:AAOWSLIce) 4 iseq (>L:var_WindshieldAntiIceSwitch_L, Bool) (>L:AAOWSLIce) 0 1 2 1 (L:var_WindshieldAntiIceSwitch_L, Bool) (L:AAOWSLIce) 4 iseq (>L:var_WindshieldAntiIceSwitch_R, Bool) (>L:AAOWSLIce)

Script.label: CEC Blower DEC
Script.script: (L:var_CockpitBlowerKnob, Number) 1 - 0 max s1 l1 (>L:var_CockpitBlowerKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CabinBlowerKnob, Number)

Script.label: CEC Blower INC
Script.script: (L:var_CockpitBlowerKnob, Number) 1 + 10 min s1 l1 (>L:var_CockpitBlowerKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CabinBlowerKnob, Number)

Script.label: CEC CabinCockpit DEC
Script.script: (L:AAOCockCabTmp) 0 == if{ (L:var_CockpitTemperatureKnob, Number) 1 - 0 max (>L:var_CockpitTemperatureKnob, Number) } els{ (L:var_CabinTemperatureKnob, Number) 1 - 0 max (>L:var_CabinTemperatureKnob, Number) }

Script.label: CEC CabinCockpit INC
Script.script: (L:AAOCockCabTmp) 0 == if{ (L:var_CockpitTemperatureKnob, Number) 1 + 25 min (>L:var_CockpitTemperatureKnob, Number) } els{ (L:var_CabinTemperatureKnob, Number) 1 + 25 min (>L:var_CabinTemperatureKnob, Number) }

Script.label: CEC Pressure Calc
Script.script: (L:var_pressurizationGoal, Feet) 3.3 * 14333 + 0.001 * (>L:BKSQECS_PressCalc) (L:var_pressurizationGoal, Feet) 0.001 * flr (>L:BKSQECS_PressCalcThous) (L:var_pressurizationGoal, Feet) 0.001 * flr s1 (L:var_pressurizationGoal, Feet) 0.001 * l1 - 1000 * (>L:BKSQECS_PressCalcHund)

Script.label: ELEC Gen L RESET
Script.script: (A:GENERAL ENG MASTER ALTERNATOR:1, Bool) 1 == if{ 1 (>L:VAR_GENERATORRESET_L, Bool) (WAIT:250) 0 (>L:VAR_GENERATORRESET_L, Bool) }

Script.label: ELEC Gen R RESET
Script.script: (A:GENERAL ENG MASTER ALTERNATOR:2, Bool) 1 == if{ 1 (>L:VAR_GENERATORRESET_R, Bool) (WAIT:250) 0 (>L:VAR_GENERATORRESET_R, Bool) }

Script.label: ENG AutoIgn Both TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:var_AutoIgnitionSwitch_L, Bool) ! s1 l1 (>L:var_AutoIgnitionSwitch_L, Bool) (WAIT:100|200) l1 (>L:var_AutoIgnitionSwitch_R, Bool)

Script.label: ENG InertSep Both TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:var_InertialSeparatorSwitch_L, Bool) ! s1 l1 (>L:var_InertialSeparatorSwitch_L, Bool) (WAIT:100|200) l1 (>L:var_InertialSeparatorSwitch_R, Bool)

Script.label: ENG L Start TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_L, Number) 2 != if{ (L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_L, Number) ! (>L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_L, Number) } els{ 1 (>L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_L, Number) }

Script.label: ENG R Start TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_R, Number) 2 != if{ (L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_R, Number) ! (>L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_R, Number) } els{ 1 (>L:VAR_STARTERSWITCH_R, Number) }

Script.label: FUEL AftTank Both TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) ! s1 l1 (>L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) l1 (>L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_R, Bool)

Script.label: FUEL ConditionLever L CUT START TOGGLE
FUEL ConditionLever L START RUN TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_1, Bool) 0 != if{ (L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_1, Bool) 1 == if{ 2 (>L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_1, Bool) } els{ 1 (>L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_1, Bool) } }

Script.label: FUEL ConditionLever R CUT START TOGGLE
FUEL ConditionLever R START RUN TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_2, Bool) 0 != if{ (L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_2, Bool) 1 == if{ 2 (>L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_2, Bool) } els{ 1 (>L:BKSQ_ConditionLever_2, Bool) } }

Script.label: LIGHTS INT Display All DEC
Script.script: (L:var_PilotDisplaysKnob, Number) 4 - 0 max s1 l1 (>L:var_PilotDisplaysKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CenterDisplaysKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CopilotDisplaysKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_SubpanelDisplayKnobs, Number)

Script.label: LIGHTS INT Display All INC
Script.script: (L:var_PilotDisplaysKnob, Number) 4 + 100 min s1 l1 (>L:var_PilotDisplaysKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CenterDisplaysKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CopilotDisplaysKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_SubpanelDisplayKnobs, Number)

Script.label: LIGHTS INT Flood All DEC
Script.script: (L:var_InstrumentIndirectLightingKnob, Number) 4 - 0 max s1 l1 (>L:var_InstrumentIndirectLightingKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CockpitAreaLightingKnob, Number)

Script.label: LIGHTS INT Flood All INC
Script.script: (L:var_InstrumentIndirectLightingKnob, Number) 4 + 100 min s1 l1 (>L:var_InstrumentIndirectLightingKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_CockpitAreaLightingKnob, Number)

Script.label: LIGHTS INT Panel All DEC
Script.script: (L:var_MainPanelBacklightingKnob, Number) 4 - 0 max s1 l1 (>L:var_MainPanelBacklightingKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_ConsolePanelBacklightingKnob, Number)

Script.label: LIGHTS INT Panel All INC
Script.script: (L:var_MainPanelBacklightingKnob, Number) 4 + 100 min s1 l1 (>L:var_MainPanelBacklightingKnob, Number) l1 (>L:var_ConsolePanelBacklightingKnob, Number)

Script.label: MISC AFX TEST
Script.script: (L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) 1 == if{ 0 (>L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) } (L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) 0 == if{ 1 (>L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) }

Script.label: MISC AFX TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) 2 == (L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) 0 == or if{ 1 (>L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) } (L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) 1 == if{ 2 (>L:var_AutoFeatherSwitch, Number) }

(L:BKSQ_PersistentIndicatedAirspeed, knots) 120 / + * 100 min 0 max (>L:AAO_FODIntens)

Script.label: MISC Fuel Calc
Script.script: (L:AAOFuelConv) 0 == if{ (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 0 == if{ (A:FUEL TANK LEFT MAIN QUANTITY, gallons) (A:FUEL TANK LEFT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) + 6.7 * (>L:AAOFuelL) } els{ (A:FUEL TANK LEFT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) 6.7 * (>L:AAOFuelL) } } els{ (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 0 == if{ (A:FUEL TANK LEFT MAIN QUANTITY, liter) (A:FUEL TANK LEFT AUX QUANTITY, liter) + 0.801 * (>L:AAOFuelL) } els{ (A:FUEL TANK LEFT AUX QUANTITY, liter) 0.801 * (>L:AAOFuelL) } } (L:AAOFuelConv) 0 == if{ (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 0 == if{ (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT MAIN QUANTITY, gallons) (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) + 6.7 * (>L:AAOFuelR) } els{ (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) 6.7 * (>L:AAOFuelR) } } els{ (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 0 == if{ (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT MAIN QUANTITY, liter) (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT AUX QUANTITY, liter) + 0.801 * (>L:AAOFuelR) } els{ (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT AUX QUANTITY, liter) 0.801 * (>L:AAOFuelR) } } (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 1 == if{ 1 (>L:AAOFuelAux) } els{ 0 (>L:AAOFuelAux) } (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 0 == if{ (A:FUEL TANK LEFT MAIN QUANTITY, gallons) (A:FUEL TANK LEFT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) + (>L:AAOScaleL) } els{ (A:FUEL TANK LEFT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) (>L:AAOScaleL) } (L:VAR_AFTTANKQUANTITYBUTTON_L, Bool) 0 == if{ (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT MAIN QUANTITY, gallons) (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) + (>L:AAOScaleR) } els{ (A:FUEL TANK RIGHT AUX QUANTITY, gallons) (>L:AAOScaleR) }

Script.label: MISC Headphone TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:BKSQ_HEADPHONESIMULATIONTARGET, Number) 0 == if{ (L:VAR_LASTHEADPHONESIMULATIONTARGET, Number) (>L:BKSQ_HEADPHONESIMULATIONTARGET, Number) } els{ 0 (>L:BKSQ_HEADPHONESIMULATIONTARGET, Number) }

Script.label: MISC Master CautWarn BOTH
Script.script: (L:VAR_MASTERWARNINGLATCHING, Bool) 1 == if{ 1 (>K:BKSQ Starship-MISC Master Warn) } (L:VAR_MASTERWARNINGLATCHING, Bool) 1 != (L:VAR_MASTERCAUTIONLATCHING, Bool) 1 == and if{ 1 (>K:BKSQ Starship-MISC Master Caut) }

Script.label: MISC Multimeter TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:var_MultimeterMode, Number) 5 < if{ (L:var_MultimeterMode, Number) ++ (>L:var_MultimeterMode, Number) } els{ 0 (>L:var_MultimeterMode, Number) }
